channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: PR Desk for Bitbucket Cloud - Tue Mar 17 10:19:19 UTC 2026
item.description:
Review Bitbucket Cloud pull requests, inspect diffs, manage comments, and keep PR workflows inside JetBrains IDEs.
vendor: gther248 downloads: 8 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.kimdonggeun.prdesk.bitbucketcloud

item.title: Vantage: Spring Boot Performance Analyzer - Mon Mar 16 19:58:43 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Yunus BAYDAR downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.vantage.vantage-intellij-plugin

item.title: libSQL / Turso - Tue Mar 17 17:44:10 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: dot industries, Inc downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.dotinc.datagrip-libsql
